$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['nickname','avatar','provider','createdAt','updatedAt']) && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('provider').val() === 'google' && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber()

avatar..validate: newData.hasChildren(['skin','hair','shirt','accent','style','accessory']) && newData.child('skin').isString() && newData.child('hair').isString() && newData.child('shirt').isString() && newData.child('accent').isString() && newData.child('style').isString() && newData.child('accessory').isString()

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['version','game','updatedAt']) && newData.child('version').val() === 1 && newData.child('game').isString() && newData.child('game').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('game').val().length <= 1000000 && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').val() >= now - 120000 && newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now + 120000)

$zone..read: auth != null && auth.token.firebase.identities['google.com'] != null && ($zone === 'plaza' || $zone === 'district-0' || $zone === 'district-1' || $zone === 'district-2' || $zone === 'district-3' || $zone === 'training-grove') && query.limitToLast != null && query.limitToLast <= 40

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['nickname','avatar','x','y','direction','moving','action','actionAt','lastSeen']) && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('x').isNumber() && newData.child('x').val() >= 0 && newData.child('x').val() <= 2048 && newData.child('y').isNumber() && newData.child('y').val() >= 0 && newData.child('y').val() <= 1536 && (newData.child('direction').val() === 'up' || newData.child('direction').val() === 'down' || newData.child('direction').val() === 'left' || newData.child('direction').val() === 'right') && newData.child('moving').isBoolean() && newData.child('action').isString() && newData.child('actionAt').isNumber() && newData.child('lastSeen').isNumber() && newData.child('lastSeen').val() >= now - 120000 && newData.child('lastSeen').val() <= now + 120000)

avatar..validate: newData.hasChildren(['skin','hair','shirt','accent','style','accessory']) && newData.child('skin').isString() && newData.child('hair').isString() && newData.child('shirt').isString() && newData.child('accent').isString() && newData.child('style').isString() && newData.child('accessory').isString()

$room..write: auth != null && auth.token.firebase.identities['google.com'] != null && $room.length === 6 && $room.matches(/^[A-HJ-NP-Z2-9]{6}$/) && ((!data.exists() && newData.hasChildren(['meta','members']) && newData.child('meta').child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('meta').child('status').val() === 'lobby' && newData.child('members').child(auth.uid).exists()) || (data.exists() && !newData.exists() && data.child('meta').child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid))

bossHp..validate: newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.parent().child('bossMax').isNumber() && newData.val() <= newData.parent().child('bossMax').val() && (!data.exists() || (newData.val() <= data.val() && newData.val() >= data.val() - 40))

moduleId..validate: newData.isString() && (newData.val() === 'all' || newData.val() === 'learn' || newData.val() === 'curriculum' || newData.val() === 'measure' || newData.val() === 'research' || newData.val() === 'psych' || newData.val() === 'media' || newData.val() === 'classroom' || newData.val() === 'profession' || newData.val() === 'eduact' || newData.val() === 'child' || newData.val() === 'disability' || newData.val() === 'civil' || newData.val() === 'ksp' || newData.val() === 'voclaw' || newData.val() === 'culture' || newData.val() === 'english' || newData.val() === 'policy' || newData.val() === 'student' || newData.val() === 'admin' || newData.val() === 'quality' || newData.val() === 'current') && (!data.exists() || newData.val() === data.val())

createdAt..validate: newData.isNumber() && ((!data.exists() && newData.val() >= now - 120000 && newData.val() <= now + 120000) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === data.val()))

startedAt..validate: newData.isNumber() && ((!data.exists() && newData.val() === 0) || newData.val() === data.val() || (data.val() === 0 && newData.val() >= now - 120000 && newData.val() <= now + 120000 && newData.parent().child('status').val() === 'active'))

score..validate: newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.val() <= 20000 && (!data.exists() || (newData.val() >= data.val() && newData.val() <= data.val() + 40))

correct..validate: newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.val() <= 2000 && (!data.exists() || (newData.val() >= data.val() && newData.val() <= data.val() + 1))

joinedAt..validate: newData.isNumber() && ((!data.exists() && newData.val() >= now - 120000 && newData.val() <= now + 120000) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === data.val()))

emote..validate: newData.isString() && (newData.val() === '' || newData.val() === 'hi' || newData.val() === 'go' || newData.val() === 'help' || newData.val() === 'wow' || newData.val() === 'gg')

emoteAt..validate: newData.isNumber() && (newData.val() === 0 || (newData.val() >= now - 120000 && newData.val() <= now + 120000) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === data.val()))

avatar..validate: newData.hasChildren(['skin','hair','shirt','accent','style','accessory']) && newData.child('skin').isString() && newData.child('hair').isString() && newData.child('shirt').isString() && newData.child('accent').isString() && newData.child('style').isString() && newData.child('accessory').isString()
